meaning: n.(男人的)贴身男仆,<美>衣物架vt.伺候
examples: Admission is $30. Valet parking will be available.
Set up a "Valet Parking" sign in front of the store.
"Forgive me," one 2006 winner said, "I wrote this on my valet parking ticket."
And because this is LA, you can valet park your bike if you want.
Much earlier than many had expected, people spilled out to retrieve their cars from the valet.
